name: photomaker-style
description: Create photos, paintings and avatars for anyone in any style within seconds.  (Stylization version)

disable_safety_checker.description: Disable safety checker for generated images.
disable_safety_checker.title: Disable Safety Checker

guidance_scale.description: Guidance scale. A guidance scale of 1 corresponds to doing no classifier free guidance.
guidance_scale.title: Guidance Scale

input_image.description: The input image, for example a photo of your face.
input_image.title: Input Image

negative_prompt.default: nsfw, lowres, bad anatomy, bad hands, text, error, missing fingers, extra digit, fewer digits, cropped, worst quality, low quality, normal quality, jpeg artifacts, signature, watermark, username, blurry
negative_prompt.description: Negative Prompt. The negative prompt should NOT contain the trigger word.
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

prompt.default: A photo of a person img
prompt.description: Prompt. Example: 'a photo of a man/woman img'. The phrase 'img' is the trigger word.
prompt.title: Prompt

seed.description: Seed. Leave blank to use a random number
seed.title: Seed

style_name.description: Style template. The style template will add a style-specific prompt and negative prompt to the user's prompt.
style_name.title: style_name
